title: ‘State-sanctioned cruelty’: Chelsea family sues ICE after Mother’s Day arrest last year
author: Ross Cristantiello
bullets: Chelsea family sues ICE citing excessive force during May 11, 2025 arrest; father detained in front of children.
Lawsuit claims ICE agents used 'state-sanctioned cruelty' and caused trauma to family during Mother's Day operation.
Operation Patriot led to detainment of 1,500 people in Massachusetts; videotaped incident shows aggressive ICE tactics.

title: In rare sightings, scientists spot blue whales in waters off Martha’s Vineyard
author: Ross Cristantiello
bullets: New England Aquarium scientists spotted blue whales in southern New England waters, a rare occurrence for the area.
Sightings occurred near Northeast Canyons Marine Monument and 15 miles south of Martha's Vineyard in late February 2026.
The blue whale population in the western North Atlantic is estimated at 400-600, with sightings indicating favorable feeding conditions.

title: One person found, one still missing after fishing boat overturns off Cape Cod
author: Abby Patkin
bullets: The Coast Guard recovered one unconscious person after the Yankee Rose overturned off Cape Cod Thursday.
The fishing vessel capsized three nautical miles northeast of Race Point in Provincetown with two people onboard.
Search efforts continue for a second individual who remains missing after the incident.

title: Fenway location of Regina Pizzeria has closed
author: Katelyn Umholtz
bullets: Regina Pizzeria's Fenway location at 1330 Boylston St. has closed after the lease was not renewed.
Boston Restaurant Associates confirmed the closure, and the location has been removed from Regina's website.
Regina Pizzeria maintains a presence in Massachusetts with 12 locations, mainly quick-service rather than sit-down venues.

title: Mansfield man killed in crash on I-95 in Attleboro, officials say
author: Samantha Genzer
bullets: Chad Askew, 43, from Mansfield, died after his Honda Civic crashed into a tractor-trailer on I-95 in Attleboro.
The crash occurred at 5:20 a.m. near Exit 4; fire crews took Askew to Sturdy Memorial Hospital where he died.
Massachusetts State Police are searching for a man who reportedly fled the scene dressed in shorts and boots.

title: Newly released video shows crash that left pickup truck dangling over Zakim Bridge
author: Samantha Genzer
bullets: Video shows a pickup truck nearly going off Zakim Bridge after a crash on February 5.
A snowbank and fence prevented the truck from falling, as seen in Massachusetts Department of Transportation footage.
No injuries were reported; a heavy-duty tow truck secured the pickup, according to Massachusetts State Police.

title: A Mass. college is buying a local golf course. Here’s why.
author: Samantha Genzer
bullets: Stonehill College is purchasing the 150-acre Easton Country Club to enhance athletics, academics, and community access.
The semi-private club will remain open to Stonehill students, staff, and the local golf community, maintaining current operations.
The acquisition supports Stonehill's 2030 strategic plan, providing athletic fields and educational opportunities like coursework and employment.

title: A deported dad, a city in chaos, and a Tinder sting
author: Meredith Goldstein
bullets: Christina Toledo and Nexan Aroldo Asencio Corado face relocation challenges after Nexan's deportation to Guatemala.
Chris Muther reports on chaos in Puerto Vallarta after the killing of a New Generation cartel leader.
Patricia Wen investigates a college students' sting operation using Tinder, leading to unexpected real-world consequences.

title: Boston restaurant hit with brief license suspension after hosting Patriots players’ raucous party
author: Abby Patkin
bullets: Estella restaurant in Boston had its liquor license suspended for one day after hosting a party with Patriots players.
The party involved violations including indoor smoking, unauthorized adult entertainment, and after-hours liquor consumption.
Restaurant owner Helder George Brandao accepted responsibility but alleged players brought their own liquor and entertainment.

title: Netflix acquires Ben Affleck’s AI startup InterPositive
author: Kevin Slane
bullets: Netflix acquires AI startup InterPositive, co-founded by Ben Affleck, to aid filmmakers with production tools.
InterPositive's AI tools focus on enhancing creative choices and solving common film production issues.
Ben Affleck sees AI as a craftsman, improving efficiency and reducing costs in the filmmaking process.
